Proactive jobs create or reuse visible GitHub issues, then wake the normal issue handler with `workflow_dispatch`. Prompt bodies and issue bodies are not included in this report.

### Workflow
- `.github/workflows/gitclaw-proactive.yml` bytes=`2683` lines=`76` workflow_dispatch=`true` schedule=`true` sha256_12=`91d1e5f4b023`

### Prompt Files
- `.gitclaw/proactive/repo-hygiene.md` bytes=`702` lines=`16` skill_hints=`1` sha256_12=`13ff11d7e50c`

### Enqueue Contract
- `gitclaw proactive enqueue --name <name> --slot <slot> --prompt-file .gitclaw/proactive/<name>.md [--not-before <rfc3339-or-date>]`
- `--not-before` skips issue creation until the due gate has passed, which supports reminder-style scheduled jobs
- one issue per `name + slot`
- dispatch id: `proactive-<name>-<slot>`
